biography: Riku, recognized as the brother of Panu, made his sole appearance in the distinctive Hector Trophée. His brief involvement added a unique familial dimension to the tournament's landscape, further weaving the intricate personal connections that characterize this annual competition.

During his single competitive outing, Riku applied himself with notable commitment. Although he did not achieve victory in either the Hector Trophée for the winning pair or the individual Victor Trophy, his participation nonetheless enriched the competitive atmosphere. Having since concluded his active engagement in Hector events, Riku will not be present at the Hector Trophée 2026. Nevertheless, his contribution, however singular, is recorded within the tournament's evolving chronicle.
